spec.description: InvestPilot application metrics - commands, errors, durations, pipeline health, and infrastructure.

spec.title: Commands Published (ops/sec)
spec.description: Rate of commands published by the operational node, stacked by status.

spec.title: Commands Received by Decisional Node
spec.description: Rate of commands received by the decisional node, stacked by status.

spec.title: Command Error Rate %
spec.description: Percentage of decisional commands that resulted in an error.

spec.title: Rebalance Stale Aborts (last 24h)
spec.description: Total rebalance aborts due to stale data in the past 24 hours.

spec.title: Command Duration P99
spec.description: 99th percentile command execution duration by command type.

spec.title: Forecast Duration P50 / P95
spec.description: P50 and P95 latency of forecast operations.

spec.title: Assets Skipped in Rebalance
spec.description: Rate of assets skipped during rebalance decisions.

spec.title: Pipeline Duration P50 / P95
spec.description: P50 and P95 duration per pipeline type (daily, intraday, rebalance_batch).

spec.title: Go API Request Rate & Error Rate
spec.description: HTTP request rate by method/path/status (bars) and P95 request latency per path (lines).

spec.title: Pod Restarts
spec.description: Total container restarts per pod in the investpilot namespace.

spec.expression: SELECT A.pod AS Pod, A.__value__ AS Restarts, NULLIF(B.__value__, 0) AS "Last Restart" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.pod = B.pod ORDER BY A.__value__ DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: CronJob Last Success
spec.description: Last successful run time per CronJob. CronJobs that have never run are excluded.

spec.expression: SELECT B.cronjob AS CronJob, A.__value__ AS "Last Success" FROM B LEFT JOIN A ON B.cronjob = A.cronjob ORDER BY COALESCE(A.__value__, 0) DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Node CPU Usage %
spec.description: Average CPU usage per node (idle mode subtracted from 100%).

spec.title: Node Memory Usage %
spec.description: Memory usage percentage per node based on available vs total memory.

spec.title: CronJob Next Schedule
spec.description: Next scheduled run time per CronJob.

spec.title: CronJob Last Failure
spec.description: Most recent failed job start time per CronJob. Only CronJobs with at least one failed job run are shown.

spec.expr: max by(owner_name) ((kube_job_status_start_time{namespace="investpilot"} * on(job_name) group_left(owner_name) kube_job_owner{namespace="investpilot", owner_kind="CronJob"}) and on(job_name) kube_job_failed{namespace="investpilot", condition="true"}) * 1000

spec.expression: SELECT B.cronjob AS CronJob, A.__value__ AS "Last Failure" FROM B LEFT JOIN A ON B.cronjob = A.owner_name ORDER BY COALESCE(A.__value__, 0) DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Rebalance Batch User Count Distribution
spec.description: P50/P95 users per batch run and batch run rate. Uses 1h window - batch rebalance runs monthly, shorter windows return no data between runs.

spec.title: Go API Latency - P50 / P95 / P99 per Path
spec.description: Latency percentiles per API path. Panel 8 Query B shows P95 as a traffic overlay - this panel isolates latency per percentile for SLA tracking.

spec.title: InvestPilot - Application
